name: Ground Zero
flavorHeadline: Carolina Reaper + Trinidad Moruga Scorpion, charred tomato character
heatDescriptor: Total devastation — for the few who dare
jarImageAlt: Jar of Tomato Warning Ground Zero EF-5 hot sauce with a near-black label
productStory: Ground Zero isn't a dare. It's a destination. Carolina Reaper and Trinidad Moruga Scorpion don't apologize, and neither do we. The charred tomato base gives it just enough structure to remind you this is still food — and then the storm takes everything else. You were warned.
pairings: Chili con carne for the fearless
Hot wings that needed to be hotter
